title: UnifiedOrderRequestForRealCreateOrderDocs
description: Request payload for creating an order to open or close a position.

action.description: The order action type. Possible values: open, close.

transaction.description: The transaction direction. Possible values: buy, sell, sellShort, buyToCover.

symbol.description: The asset ticker symbol. Required for open orders.

instrumentId.description: The eToro instrument identifier. Required for open orders.

orderType.description: The order execution type. Possible values: mkt (market), mit (market if touched).

triggerRate.description: The trigger rate for mit orders. Required for mit orders.

leverage.description: The leverage multiplier to apply. Required for open orders.

amount.description: The monetary amount to invest in the order currency. Mutually exclusive with units and contracts.

orderCurrency.description: The currency for the order amount. Typically usd.

units.description: The number of units to trade. Mutually exclusive with amount and contracts.

contracts.description: The number of contracts to trade. Mutually exclusive with amount and units.

stopLossRate.description: The stop-loss rate at which the position will automatically close.

takeProfitRate.description: The take-profit rate at which the position will automatically close.

stopLossType.description: The stop-loss type. Possible values: fixed, trailing.

additionalMargin.description: Additional margin to allocate to the position.

positionIds.description: List of position IDs to close. Required for close orders.
